before_reasoning: Lower 艮: inner stillness of tradition/craft being preserved. Upper 坤: outer environment of receptivity, humble ground where exchange hasn't yet begun.
after_reasoning: Lower 離: inner clarity and illumination—deepened respect for craft. Upper 兌: outer joy and openness from exchange with participants.

before_reasoning: Lower 艮: inner stillness, entrepreneurs not yet connected. Upper 巽: outer environment of gradual penetration, community forming slowly.
after_reasoning: Lower 兌: inner joy and openness in exchange. Upper 震: outer dynamic movement of startup collaboration and new ventures.

before_reasoning: Lower 坤: inner stability and settled routine with car. Upper 艮: outer environment of stagnation in rural car-dependent society.
after_reasoning: Lower 巽: inner flexibility and adaptation to new transport modes. Upper 兌: outer joy—savings, health, and becoming a model case for community.

before_reasoning: Lower 離: inner brilliance and high visibility of the tourism peak. Upper 兌: outer joy and confidence from inbound tourism boom.
after_reasoning: Lower 艮: inner stopping and consolidation, shifting to survival mode. Upper 坎: outer difficulty from foreign tourist disappearance.

before_reasoning: Lower 坎: inner danger—addiction, arrests, deep personal crisis. Upper 震: outer shocks—repeated arrests and public scandal.
after_reasoning: Lower 離: inner clarity and brilliance—artistic talent reignited. Upper 乾: outer strong leadership as the face of MCU.

before_reasoning: Lower 坤: inner stable foundation of existing snack business. Upper 巽: outer gradual penetration into market, observing opportunities.
after_reasoning: Lower 乾: inner strong creative drive producing hit after hit. Upper 兌: outer joyful exchange with consumers—expanded from snacks to cereal.

before_reasoning: Lower 坎: inner difficulty and emotional strain of raising a child with developmental disorder. Upper 震: outer shocks from navigating institutional systems.
after_reasoning: Lower 巽: inner gradual adaptation, trying to coordinate school and therapy. Upper 坎: outer ongoing difficulty—situation remains challenging.

before_reasoning: Lower 艮: inner stopping—old system completely halted by directive. Upper 坎: outer crisis from postwar dismantling of state Shinto.
after_reasoning: Lower 乾: inner strong organizational leadership encompassing 80,000 shrines. Upper 坤: outer receptive foundation—becoming a civilian religious institution rooted in daily life.

before_reasoning: Lower 離: outer visibility—the dramatic political fall was highly public. Upper 坎: inner danger—Rikyu forced to commit seppuku, tea tradition at risk.
after_reasoning: Lower 巽: inner gradual penetration—three houses spreading tea culture over 500 years. Upper 乾: outer creative strength—thriving as a cultural institution with global reach.

before_reasoning: Lower 震: inner new movement—volunteer editors beginning to create content. Upper 坎: outer difficulty and chaos—unstructured early wiki with quality concerns.
after_reasoning: Lower 兌: inner openness—free knowledge accessible to all. Upper 巽: outer gradual penetration—becoming an established, trusted knowledge infrastructure.

before_reasoning: Lower 坤: inner receptive, stable foundation—500-year tradition. Upper 艮: outer stillness—traditional confectionery world, steady but not dynamic.
after_reasoning: Lower 艮: inner steadfastness—core product (yokan) preserved. Upper 巽: outer gradual penetration—Paris expansion, cafe format, continuous subtle innovation.

before_reasoning: Lower 艮: inner stopping—path blocked, dreams halted. Upper 坎: outer crisis—family circumstances forcing study abroad abandonment.
after_reasoning: Lower 離: inner clarity—mastered English independently, found new path. Upper 乾: outer strong achievement—simultaneous interpreter for major corporations.

before_reasoning: Lower 艮: inner stillness—small community of 500, accumulated local knowledge. Upper 坤: outer receptive but stagnant rural environment.
after_reasoning: Lower 震: inner new movement—community-driven ventures (small hydro, local products). Upper 巽: outer gradual penetration—becoming a model for sustainable rural development.

before_reasoning: Lower 坎: inner danger—financial losses causing distress. Upper 震: outer shocks from volatile market movements.
after_reasoning: Lower 艮: inner blocking—investor stuck, unable to act. Upper 坎: outer difficulty persists—market conditions remain adverse.

before_reasoning: Lower 巽: inner scattered flexibility—resources spread across many ventures. Upper 震: outer chaotic movement—aggressive diversification in turbulent conditions.
after_reasoning: Lower 坎: inner danger—cash flow crisis threatening survival. Upper 坤: outer collapse—business ground crumbling, heading toward bankruptcy.

before_reasoning: Lower 艮: inner stopping—stuck in repeated failed fertility treatments. Upper 坎: outer difficulty—physical and emotional exhaustion from 10+ IVF attempts.
after_reasoning: Lower 離: inner clarity—new identity as parents, redefining family beyond blood ties. Upper 兌: outer joy—love connection with adopted child.

before_reasoning: Lower 坎: inner crisis—massive 15M yen debt from leveraged FX losses. Upper 兌: outer depleted joy—the promise of easy gains turned to ruin.
after_reasoning: Lower 艮: inner steadfastness—disciplined 5-year repayment with wife's support. Upper 巽: outer gradual progress—qualification gained, income increased 2M yen.

before_reasoning: Lower 坤: inner receptive stability—established aristocratic order. Upper 離: outer brilliance—Heian court culture at its peak.
after_reasoning: Lower 震: inner new movement—rise of warrior class from below. Upper 艮: outer stopping—aristocratic system reaching its limit and ending.

before_reasoning: Lower 坎: inner distress from workplace abuse. Upper 震: outer shock of power harassment forcing departure.
after_reasoning: Lower 坤: inner receptive stability in healthy workplace. Upper 艮: outer stillness—settled, steady employment without drama.

before_reasoning: Lower 坤: inner stable foundation of existing data practices. Upper 離: outer visibility—data in the open, not yet tightly controlled.
after_reasoning: Lower 艮: inner stopping—organizations restricting data handling practices. Upper 乾: outer strong regulatory authority enforcing compliance.

before_reasoning: Lower 震: inner drive and movement—passionate pursuit of music dreams. Upper 離: outer fire and attention—performing on stage, seeking breakthrough.
after_reasoning: Lower 坤: inner receptive passivity—no marketable skills, starting from zero. Upper 艮: outer stopping—career path blocked, relegated to part-time warehouse work.

before_reasoning: Lower 艮: inner accumulated knowledge sitting unused. Upper 坤: outer stagnant environment—no outlet for expression.
after_reasoning: Lower 離: inner clarity—expertise articulated through writing. Upper 兌: outer joyful exchange—audience response, publishing offers, speaking invitations.

before_reasoning: Lower 坤: inner stable, humble foundation as workwear maker. Upper 艮: outer stillness—niche market, limited visibility.
after_reasoning: Lower 離: inner brilliance and attention—'Workman Joshi' boom, viral SNS presence. Upper 兌: outer joy and openness—fan community engagement, ambassador program.

before_reasoning: Lower 艮: inner stopping—parks closed or restricted. Upper 坎: outer crisis from COVID impact on park operations.
after_reasoning: Lower 乾: inner creative strength—aggressive recovery strategy. Upper 兌: outer joy—record-breaking attendance and revenue.

before_reasoning: Lower 震: inner new movement—political revolution overthrowing socialist system. Upper 坎: outer danger and difficulty—economic chaos of transition.
after_reasoning: Lower 乾: inner strong creative drive—decisive market reforms and NATO/EU integration. Upper 坤: outer receptive stability—solid economic foundation, resilient through crises.
